commonFlutterExceptions.reason: Flutter has no DOM element or Slot cloning model.

commonFlutterExceptions.upstream: CSS margin props and responsive-object syntax
commonFlutterExceptions.flutter: Parent layout widgets and concrete enum values
commonFlutterExceptions.reason: Layout ownership and responsive resolution are Flutter-native concerns.

commonFlutterExceptions.flutter: Logical pixels and Flutter engine rasterization
commonFlutterExceptions.reason: Resolved geometry and colors are normative; edge anti-aliasing may differ by one 8-bit channel.

flutterExceptions: ImageProvider and Widget fallback replace DOM src/fallback nodes; no ring prop is exposed.
Arbitrary Widget content uses DefaultTextStyle and IconTheme; there is no dedicated icon API.
The visual recipe maps Radix size, variant, and states onto the established required-label Remix button; arbitrary child content is deferred.
Widget icon/content slots replace the upstream compound React nodes.
The visual recipe maps Radix size and variant onto the established passive Remix card.
Nullable bool plus tristate maps the Radix indeterminate checked state.

Logical-pixel BoxConstraints replace CSS width and height strings; inherited Fortal and Mix scopes are replayed through Navigator overlays; modal controls accessibility route scoping while the Flutter Navigator route remains pointer-modal.
Axis and separator Semantics replace DOM orientation and role attributes.
The visual recipe maps supported Radix states onto the established data-driven RemixMenuItem list; compound menu items are deferred.
A required semanticLabel supplies the accessible name that icon-only DOM buttons receive from aria-label.
A separate anchor Widget and OverlayPositionConfig replace Radix anchor and collision props; Fortal intentionally renders no Popover arrow.
The visual recipe maps Radix styling onto the established normalized determinate progress value.
FortalRadioGroup provides typed Flutter group semantics and selection coordination.
The visual recipe maps supported Radix states onto the established data-driven RemixSelectItem list and single historical variant.
The visual recipe maps Radix styling onto the established scalar horizontal slider; range and multi-thumb behavior is deferred.
A leaf painter maps the Radix spinner geometry; loading gates and child overlays are deferred.
Boolean selection and Flutter focus/feedback APIs replace DOM checked attributes and events.
The visual recipe maps Radix tab states onto the established single-child TabBar.
error is a documented Fortal extension and must set invalid semantics plus red error/focus roles; Flutter text editing APIs replace input DOM props.
OverlayPositionConfig and resolved OverlayPlacement drive a CustomPaint arrow after collision resolution; width constraints use logical pixels.
Fortal extension: excluded from the Radix parity score and styled from shared Fortal tokens.

Fortal extension: excluded from the Radix parity score and styled from shared Fortal tokens.

approximations.upstream: Radix Dialog with modal=false permits background pointer interaction while the content is open.
approximations.flutter: RemixDialog with modal=false disables modal accessibility route scoping, but showRemixDialog remains a RawDialogRoute whose barrier blocks background pointer input.
approximations.reason: Flutter Navigator dialog routes are modal routes; non-modal pointer interaction requires a separate OverlayEntry lifecycle rather than the approved dialog route API.
approximations.tolerance: Interaction-model boundary only; no visual tolerance. The route barrier and both accessibility modes are covered by dialog_widget_test.dart.
